scripts.postbuild: mkdir -p .medusa/server/public/admin; npx tsc medusa-config.ts --module commonjs || true; cp medusa-config.js .medusa/server/ || true; cp package.json .medusa/server/ || true; cp -a dist/. .medusa/server/ 2>/dev/null || true; cp -a build/. .medusa/server/public/admin/ 2>/dev/null || true; exit 0
